use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in landing pages and marketing sections
Form submission and action triggers with multiple visual variants
Navigation action buttons with hover and focus states
Reusable button component for composable UI systems
Accessible action elements with keyboard navigation support
ai_summary: A flexible, reusable Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes, built on Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility. Uses class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management and includes standard accessibility patterns like focus-visible rings and disabled states. Designed as a core atomic component commonly used in CTA cards and action-trigger scenarios across SaaS, e-commerce, and general web applications.
